negative_memory.hypothesis_tested: fold-local intraday extreme retest failure reversal rank over extreme retest pressure, rejection wick, failed breakout recovery, reversal body turn, close reclaim, range compression, volume exhaustion, opposite room, opening range reclaim, prior session contrast, session phase maturity, and spread stress inverse features
negative_memory.next_boundary: C0110 R0001 shows the tested extreme retest failure reversal surface is not a candidate as implemented; remaining C0110 variants would be adjacent tuning, so next work should choose a new major C0111 hypothesis without selected, economics-pass, runtime, materialization, ONNX, promotion, or live claims
negative_memory.reason_not_candidate: activity landed inside the target band, but proxy, closed-bar MT5 logic, aggregate MT5 tick, and fold-isolated MT5 tick evidence did not establish a candidate

supporting_lessons.summary: R0001 produced 0 profitable and 9 losing fold-isolated MT5 tick folds, total tick net PnL -143.18, and worst fold rw_007 net PnL -22.64.
Schedule replay mechanical parity passed with mismatch_count 0, so the weak result is not explained by proxy-vs-MT5 logic mismatch.
Tick execution improved closed-bar logic by 44.02 total net PnL across 8 better and 1 worse folds, but both logic and tick surfaces remained negative.
Native MQL signal logic, ONNX materialization, cost/slippage hardening, final sizing, and historical lineage debt remain unresolved; no stronger claim is created.

required_kpi_summary.remaining_work_classification: no_candidate; further C0110 work would be adjacent threshold, stop, target, hold, session, activity, spread, capital, or extreme-retest-failure-reversal feature nudge tuning

hypothesis_variant.summary: fold-local intraday extreme retest failure reversal rank run
hypothesis_variant.variant_boundary: C0110 R0001 tests whether a same-session high or low retest that fails, rejects through wick absorption, recovers back inside the session range, and shows reversal body turn, close reclaim, range compression, volume exhaustion, opposite-side room, opening-range reclaim, and prior-session contrast can form a target-first reversal surface after realistic spread cost. It changes feature family, label conditioning, model context, and trade-logic state key from C0109 failed VWAP reversion continuation. It is not a threshold/window/SL/TP/session/spread/capital nudge, materialization step, ONNX step, selected claim, runtime claim, or retry-only run.

pre_open_decision.adjacent_tuning_rejection_reason: No C0109 thresholds, windows, stops, targets, sessions, spread gates, VWAP feature nudges, or capital sizing changes are used as the run question.

surface_distance_rationale.feature: Extreme retest pressure, rejection wick, failed breakout recovery, close reclaim, range compression, volume exhaustion, opposite room, opening-range reclaim, and prior-session contrast replace C0109 VWAP-dislocation continuation features.
surface_distance_rationale.label: Target-first quality after extreme retest failure reversal, not target-first quality after failed VWAP reversion continuation.
surface_distance_rationale.model: Fold-local linear extreme retest failure reversal rank.
surface_distance_rationale.trade_logic: Reversal-direction top fold-local extreme-retest-failure-reversal scores per active day.

pre_open_decision.true_variant_summary: New major campaign surface asks whether failed retests of same-session extremes can produce target-first reversal edge after realistic spread cost.

label.summary: Target-first quality after extreme retest failure reversal.
